name: Four Cheese Macaroni
recipeIngredient: 3 ounces reduced-fat sharp cheddar cheese, shredded
3 ounces reduced-fat Monterey Jack cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F.
2. In a large pot of boiling water, cook pasta wheels (or any small pasta) for 8-10 minutes, until tender. Drain and return the pasta to the pot.
3. In a non-stick pan, add milk, all cheeses, and white pepper. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until the cheeses are melted.
4. Add the cooked, drained macaroni to the cheese sauce.
5. Spray Pam in a 1 1/2 quart cassarole dish and pour the macaroni mixture into it.
6. Ensure you use a non-stick pan when melting the cheese to avoid a big mess when cleaning the pan.
7. Bake for about 25-30 minutes, or until golden on top.
